best_row.claim_boundary: Translation/rotation DOF block Schur FGMRES is a physics-aware ROCm sparse preconditioner. It uses sparse subblock matvecs and Jacobi approximate triangular block solves on the ROCm torch device, and can only promote closure when full assembled CSR residual replay meets the G9 gate.
